name: Ayer

population.sourceName: US Decennial Census 2020, via Wikipedia list of MA municipalities

healthcareLandscape.dominantFacilityType: assisted living and a surviving medical office building
healthcareLandscape._context: Market context only. These facilities are NOT clients of Dory’s Cleaning Services and no copy may imply they are.
healthcareLandscape.note: CRITICAL: Nashoba Valley Medical Center closed permanently on 31 August 2024 in the Steward Health Care collapse, and must never appear as operating. There is no replacement hospital or emergency department in Ayer; UMass Memorial is building a satellite emergency facility in GROTON, not Ayer, opening in 2027. The Groton Road medical office building survived the closure and is the only remaining clinical cluster.

_howToFill: Every non-null value needs a source you actually read. majorFacilities is MARKET CONTEXT, never a client list — copy must say "serving practices in and around the {facility} corridor". Leave null rather than guess.
